vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF for #627: add strategies/delegate.md plus wiring into interview.md / speckit.md exit conditions.

plan.title: feat(strategies): add strategies/delegate.md -- controlled delegation framework for agent-driven implementation

narratives.Description: Author strategies/delegate.md per #627 (controlled delegation model, atomicity test, interview exit condition, mandatory human-review categories, relationships to other strategies). Source: 'Professional Software Developers Don't Vibe, They Control' (arXiv 2512.14012, UCSD/Cornell field study, N=13 + N=99). Cross-cutting effect: shifts the exit condition of interview/speckit so this is NOT a single-file task in practice.
narratives.Acceptance: strategies/delegate.md exists with the five sections from #627; strategies/interview.md and strategies/speckit.md gate completion on the atomicity test (no task forces an unresolved design decision); yolo.md/rapid.md note explicit opt-out from delegate.md; AGENTS.md routes the delegate keyword to the new strategy; implementation MUST get explicit user sign-off on the mandatory-human-review category list before they land as `!` rules.
narratives.Scope: Primary: new strategies/delegate.md. Secondary: small wiring edits to strategies/interview.md and strategies/speckit.md to gate on atomicity test. Optional: AGENTS.md routing trigger (/deft:run:delegate); cross-refs from interview.md/speckit.md/yolo.md/rapid.md.

x-migrator.PhaseDescription: Near-up structural priority -- post-cutover stabilization, structural unblockers (items gating many others), and cross-cutting items whose effect spans multiple skills, strategies, or files.
x-migrator.Description: Add strategies/delegate.md and wire its atomicity test into interview/speckit exit conditions. Cross-cutting effect on every spec-generating workflow.
x-migrator.Rationale: Phase 2 (rather than Phase 3) because the atomicity test changes the interview/speckit exit condition -- knock-on effect across every spec-generating workflow. Discriminator from Phase 3 content additions (#622, #623): cross-cutting effect on multiple strategies, not bounded to a single file.

references.title: Issue #627: feat(strategies): add strategies/delegate.md -- controlled delegation framework for agent-driven implementation
Companion: #622 (communication bridge filter; same theme of agent-handoff boundary)
Companion: #623 (Context Rot; bounded sub-task decomposition aligns with atomicity test)
